title: Attribute latency to the mesh proxy vs the application
description: Use mesh telemetry and per-hop spans to separate sidecar overhead and telemetry cost from real application latency.
body: Use when adopting the mesh introduces a latency regression. Do not assume the application got slower. Actions: read distributed traces for the inbound/outbound proxy spans to measure per-hop overhead, check proxy CPU and whether full-detail telemetry/access logs are inflating cost, reduce telemetry sampling or scope sidecar config (Sidecar resource) to needed services, and compare meshed vs non-meshed latency. Validation signals include trace spans isolating proxy time and latency dropping after trimming telemetry or scoping the proxy. Risk boundary: changing telemetry or proxy resources on production warrants review.
